name: consumer_banking_recall_notice_arrives_lumen_rig_utl
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Consumer Banking, the situation tagged internally around consumer banking recall notice arrives lumen rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Sana Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Sana Alvarez, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Consumer Banking. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Serrano
agents.identity: I am Jonah Serrano, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Consumer Banking. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect utility.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Sana Alvarez must choose under rights versus utility. What does Sana Alvarez do?
